name: serverkit-dns-server
description: Host authoritative DNS on this box with PowerDNS (SQLite backend) in a managed Docker container — zones, records, DNSSEC, and delegation checks from the panel. Authoritative only (no recursion); complements provider integrations like Cloudflare, never replaces them. Built for homelab and air-gapped setups.
author: ServerKit

command_palette.label: DNS Server
command_palette.keywords: dns server powerdns authoritative nameserver zones records dnssec delegation hosting
